meaning: n.海上航道,船只在海上航行,波涛汹涌的海面
examples: Why is the St. Lawrence Seaway important to Canada?
The New Madrid Fault line in fact runs up along the Seaway.
America is bending, pulling apart so that the seaway at Buenos Aires will be expanded.
The growth of the Sevier Mountains and the Western Interior Seaway caused dinosaur habitat to shrink on Laramidia.
McMillan, of Minnesota, to be a Member of the Advisory Board of the Saint Lawrence Seaway Development Corporation, vice Scott Kevin Walker.
